projects.name: PosturePal – An AI-Based Posture Monitoring System
projects.description: Engineered a real-time posture and blink-rate monitoring system, achieving 92% classification accuracy across 5 posture classes, validated using k-fold cross-validation for generalisability

projects.name: Campus Lost & Found System
projects.description: Built a full-stack lost & found platform with image upload (Cloudinary), category-based filtering, and location search - reducing manual item-matching effort for a campus of 1000+ students.
